message:
feat(sentinel): add Phase 2 health checks and consensus modules

Implement health check evaluation and S_DOWN/O_DOWN consensus:

health.rs:
- evaluate_instance_health() for PING/PONG timeout detection
- record_pong/record_ping_sent link state management
- parse_info_response() for Redis INFO parsing
- apply_info_to_instance() updates instance metadata
- check_role_mismatch() detects master/slave role conflicts

consensus.rs:
- evaluate_o_down() checks quorum for Objective Down
- evaluate_leader_election() Raft-like majority voting
- cast_vote() with epoch validation
- should_request_vote() failover preconditions

All 30 unit tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
